name: Template request
about: Request support for a new BLE device
title: "[template] <manufacturer> <model>"
labels: template-request
---

## Device

- **Manufacturer:**
- **Model:**
- **BLE advertised name / name prefix:**

## What it does

<!-- What data does this device expose? Wind, temperature, printer status, etc. -->

## GATT layout (if known)

<!-- Service UUIDs, characteristic UUIDs, and which carry data. The BT Bridge
     agent's GATT analyser shows these for a connected device. -->

## Sample payloads (if available)

<!-- Hex captures of notification/read values, ideally with the real-world value
     they correspond to. The broker's RE capture workflow can produce these. -->

## Are you able to test against the real device?

<!-- yes / no — helps us know if decoding can be verified before publishing. -->
